scripts.setup: npm install && cd frontend && npm install
scripts.deploy: npm run setup && npm run build && npm run start
scripts.restart: lsof -ti:${PORT:-3456} | xargs kill 2>/dev/null; npm run deploy
scripts.stop: lsof -ti:${PORT:-3456} | xargs kill 2>/dev/null && echo 'Stopped' || echo 'Not running'
